tasks.prompt: Execute o slash command /rs (repo-scan) para escanear o repositório. Use o output para gerar/actualizar tasks/pipeline.json com tasks pendentes. Liste as 3 tasks mais prioritárias. Resuma em 2-3 linhas.

SRE Monitor: Run /srv/monorepo/.claude/skills/coolify-sre/scripts/sre-monitor.sh to check Coolify apps, Docker containers, health endpoints, resource usage, and subdomain tunnel status. Auto-heal degraded/down containers (whitelist only). Log results. Replaces old auto-healer (8812f46c) and resource-monitor (4cb53930).
Code review daily: Run /review on recent commits and changes. Generate REVIEW-*.md reports in docs/SPECS/reviews/ and submit via gh or save findings.
